016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.daemon;
017
018import io.micronaut.context.annotation.Context;
019import io.micronaut.context.event.BeanCreatedEvent;
020import io.micronaut.context.event.BeanCreatedEventListener;
021import io.micronaut.context.event.StartupEvent;
022import io.micronaut.http.server.netty.configuration.NettyHttpServerConfiguration;
023import io.micronaut.http.server.netty.configuration.NettyHttpServerConfiguration.NettyListenerConfiguration;
024import jakarta.inject.Singleton;
025import org.slf4j.Logger;
026import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
027
028import java.io.IOException;
029import java.nio.file.Files;
030import java.nio.file.Paths;
031import java.util.List;
032
033/**
034 * Singleton that runs early on startup and deletes stale UNIX domain sockets.
035 */
036@Singleton
037@Context
038public class UnixSocketCleanup implements BeanCreatedEventListener<StartupEvent> {
039    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(UnixSocketCleanup.class);
040
041    public UnixSocketCleanup(NettyHttpServerConfiguration serverConfiguration) {
042        // Remove stale socket files as soon as we are constructed, before the Netty server starts
043        cleanupSockets(serverConfiguration);
044    }
045
046    @Override
047    public StartupEvent onCreated(BeanCreatedEvent<StartupEvent> event) {
048        // This is called after startup, but we do the cleanup in constructor
049        return event.getBean();
050    }
051
052    /**
053     * Delete all <i>stale</i> UNIX socket files from the previous run (in case there was not a clean shutdown.)
054     * Stream the list of {@link NettyListenerConfiguration}s from the {@link NettyHttpServerConfiguration}, find
055     * all UNIX socket file paths and delete them.
056     * <p>
057     * This method should be called as early as possible in the startup process: <b>after</b> {@link NettyHttpServerConfiguration}
058     * is available and <b>before</b> the listeners are actually started.
059     * @param serverConfiguration The Netty HTTP server configuration
060     */
061    private static void cleanupSockets(NettyHttpServerConfiguration serverConfiguration) {
062        List<NettyListenerConfiguration> listeners = serverConfiguration.getListeners();
063        if (listeners != null) {
064            listeners.stream()
065                .map(NettyListenerConfiguration::getPath)
066                // Filter non-UNIX socket listeners/filesystem-paths (paths starting with '\0' are Linux "abstract paths")
067                .filter(ps -> ps != null && !ps.isEmpty() && !ps.startsWith("\0") )
068                .map(Paths::get)
069                .forEach(path -> {
070                    try {
071                        if (Files.deleteIfExists(path)) {
072                            log.info("Deleted stale Unix domain socket: {}", path);
073                        }
074                    } catch (IOException e) {
075                        log.error("Failed to delete Unix domain socket: {}", path, e);
076                    }
077                });
078        }
079    }
080}
